reason: Unlocking 'pe_cot' (Chain-of-Thought) to improve reasoning accuracy for future questions. This is a foundational skill for minimizing errors in a high-stakes environment.

I am spending my 1 Skill Point to unlock the 'pe_plan' skill (Plan+Reflect). This skill will provide a structured planning phase and a secondary reflection call, which are critical for ensuring accuracy on higher-level questions and maximizing my XP gains safely.

Unlocking the Reflection skill is a strategic priority. It provides a second LLM call to review and correct my answers, significantly reducing the risk of HP loss and ensuring more consistent XP gain as the difficulty increases.

Unlocking 'ctx_enough' will provide context from the last 5 Q&A pairs, which is valuable for maintaining consistency and accuracy in future chambers. I have exactly 1 SP available, and this is the only skill currently affordable in the shop.
